[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1101101 5
2 1001001 3
3 1110010 4
4 0000100 1
5 1010011 4
6 1000001 2
7 1000000 1

70 07 0000000 a
